Update default topo smoothing

title: Update configs (default topo smoothing) + add docs

body:
This PR changes our reproducibility tests to allow for flakiness:

 - `self_reference_or_path` -> `latest_comparable_paths`, which now returns a list of paths
 - Users can now specify `--test_broken_report_flakiness true`, which will allow failures if the reproducibility test comes back flakey, but will _fail_ if it's successfully compared against 5 previous runs, so that users can remove the `test_broken_report_flakiness` keyword.

This way, we can more widely add these reproducibility tests, and get some measure as to which tests are reproducible, and by how much.

Co-authored by @Sbozzolo
title: Allow for flakiness in reproducibility tests
